title: Quran, Sura 102: At-Takathur
description: Sura 102 (At-Takathur: The Rivalry) from the Holy Quran.
introduction: Sura 102 (At-Takathur: The Rivalry) from the Holy Quran.

translation.text: Competition in worldly increase diverts you, until you visit the graveyards. No! You are going to know. Then no! You are going to know.
